name: Manually Approve Website Customer Accounts
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Neto automatically approves new customer account registrations. You can change this setting for "}, {"text": "Retail", "bold": true}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "Wholesale", "bold": true}, {"text": " customers, allowing staff to manually to verify every registration before they can order from the webstore."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "All Settings & tools", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on the "}, {"text": "Customers", "bold": true}, {"text": " tab from the left hand side navigation menu, and click "}, {"text": "Customer Settings", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Here you can toggle whether or not you wish customers to be automatically approved when they sign up."}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "[Image: image1]"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Save Changes", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "To enable the user, simply navigate to "}, {"text": "Customers", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "View customers & prospects", "bold": true}, {"text": ". Find and edit the customer you wish to make changes to."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "On the top right hand side, click the "}, {"text": "Active", "bold": true}, {"text": " button on the top right hand side and save changes."}, {"text": "
